[console_scripts]
scitex-dev = scitex_dev._cli:main
scitex-dev-testmon = scitex_dev._hooks.run_testmon_cli:main

[scitex_dev.docs]
scitex-dev = scitex_dev

[scitex_dev.jobs]
scitex-dev-ecosystem = scitex_dev._ecosystem_jobs._provider:provide_jobs

[scitex_dev.skills]
scitex-dev = scitex_dev

[scitex_dev.system_deps]
scitex-dev = scitex_dev._system_deps:provide
